assertions.assertion: Uses workflow.fit_offline() or workflow.fit_disk() (not fit_online, since no simulator is available)
assertions.evidence: Line 153: history = workflow.fit_offline( — correctly uses fit_offline.

assertions.assertion: Splits the simulation bank into training and held-out validation/test sets
assertions.evidence: Lines 83-99: data split into train (18,000), val (1,000), and test (1,000) using shuffled indices.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT attempt to create or call a simulator function (it's unavailable)
assertions.evidence: No simulator function defined or called anywhere. Lines 229-235 explicitly note the simulator is unavailable.

assertions.assertion: Uses the naming shorthand (inference_variables=, summary_variables=) since no adapter transforms are needed, OR uses an explicit adapter — either is acceptable
assertions.evidence: Lines 109-115: explicit bf.Adapter() that concatenates into 'summary_variables' and 'inference_variables'.

assertions.assertion: Routes observables through summary_variables with a summary network (not inference_conditions)
assertions.evidence: Line 113: .concatenate(["observables"], into="summary_variables"). Line 123: summary_net = bf.networks.SetTransformer(...) passed as summary_network=summary_net.

assertions.assertion: Uses a SetTransformer for the i.i.d. observations
assertions.evidence: Line 123: summary_net = bf.networks.SetTransformer(summary_dim=2 * NUM_PARAMS, ...). Line 111: .as_set(["observables"]) reshapes for set input.

assertions.assertion: Passes validation_data= to fit_offline or fit_disk

assertions.evidence: History saved as PNG plot (training loss curve) but NOT as JSON. No structured convergence check via inspect_training or equivalent. history.history is not serialized to disk.

assertions.assertion: Uses the held-out test set for compute_default_diagnostics (not the training data)
assertions.evidence: Lines 207-209: metrics = workflow.compute_default_diagnostics(test_data=test_data, ...) uses the held-out test set.

assertions.assertion: Checks diagnostics against house thresholds before declaring success
assertions.evidence: No threshold checks applied to diagnostic metrics. Lines 207-212 compute and print diagnostics but never compare against house thresholds. Uses overly lenient thresholds (contraction > 0.1 vs skill's required 0.80).

assertions.assertion: Notes the limitation that posterior predictive checks require access to the simulator, which is unavailable
assertions.evidence: Lines 229-235: comment and print statement explicitly note PPCs cannot be performed without the simulator.
